title: RPO (Recovery Point Objective) & RTO (Recovery Time Objective)
description: Define and differentiate between Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time Objective (RTO). Design failover and disaster recovery strategies that effectively satisfy strict business continuity requirements based on RPO and RTO.
objectives: Define and differentiate between Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time Objective (RTO).
Design failover and disaster recovery strategies that effectively satisfy strict business continuity requirements based on RPO and RTO.
